title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 18–22, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Sanji, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Queen, Unknown person #20 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WITH A PRIMITIVE SMILE" written by Sanji an excerpt from the Sanji collection of great poems

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To live with you, I'd gladly become a Barbarian.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: because when you smile, even the wild fields...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...become an elegant taxola and a refined cucina.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I am a camera of romance.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A primitive beast.... ... serving both love and delicious-ness...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that nutritious food stimulated the happy chemicals in his brain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this where you've been camping, Sanji, Honey?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was a master who even served as Queen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet he somehow managed to defeat Lady Caroline!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: A maiden's first time is precious

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could you not put it that way, please?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh. Is he distracted now that he has one?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Who's turn is it to cook tonight?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Whoever it is, switch with me!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
